title: Kownanyahuw #3562
definition:
Cononiah or Conaniah = "Jehovah has established"

 1) a Levite ruler in the time of Hezekiah
 2) a Levite chief in the time of Josiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Cononiah or Conaniah = "Jehovah has established"

 1) a Levite ruler in the time of Hezekiah
 2) a Levite chief in the time of Josiah

    NASB:  Yah has sustained, two Levites
